Spring Data REST
  1. org.springframework.data.rest.core.config
  2. ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.rest.core.config.ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration

Packages that use ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.rest.core.config
 

  • Uses of ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration in org.springframework.data.rest.core.config

    Methods in org.springframework.data.rest.core.config that return ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration
    ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration.addProjection(Class<?> projectionType)
    Adds the given projection type to the configuration.
    ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration
    ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration.addProjection(Class<?> projectionType, Class<?>... sourceTypes)
    Adds a projection type for the given source types.
    ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration
    ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration.addProjection(Class<?> projectionType, String name, Class<?>... sourceTypes)
    Adds the given projection type for the given source types under the given name.
    ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration
    RepositoryRestConfiguration.getProjectionConfiguration()
    Returns the ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration to register addition projections.
    ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration
    RepositoryRestConfiguration.projectionConfiguration()
    Deprecated.
    since 2.4, use RepositoryRestConfiguration.getProjectionConfiguration() instead.
    Constructors in org.springframework.data.rest.core.config with parameters of type ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    RepositoryRestConfiguration(ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration projectionConfiguration, MetadataConfiguration metadataConfiguration, EnumTranslationConfiguration enumTranslationConfiguration)
    Creates a new RepositoryRestConfiguration with the given ProjectionDefinitionConfiguration.
